'''√w-h-ng''' ('''wahanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:peece|peece]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:peece|peece]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-h-ng
|-
! Lemma
| wahanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahangithi|wahangithi]] || [[word:wahangiji|wahangiji]] || [[word:wahangishi|wahangishi]] || [[word:wahangi|wahangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahanguthuth|wahanguthuth]] || [[word:wahangujuj|wahangujuj]] || [[word:wahangushush|wahangushush]] || [[word:wahang|wahang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahanguthu|wahanguthu]] || [[word:wahanguju|wahanguju]] || [[word:wahangushu|wahangushu]] || [[word:wahangu|wahangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahangufuth|wahangufuth]] || [[word:wahangufuj|wahangufuj]] || [[word:wahangufush|wahangufush]] || [[word:wahanguf|wahanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahangethe|wahangethe]] || [[word:wahangeje|wahangeje]] || [[word:wahangeshe|wahangeshe]] || [[word:wahange|wahange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahangothoth|wahangothoth]] || [[word:wahangojoj|wahangojoj]] || [[word:wahangoshosh|wahangoshosh]] || [[word:wahang|wahang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahangotho|wahangotho]] || [[word:wahangojo|wahangojo]] || [[word:wahangosho|wahangosho]] || [[word:wahango|wahango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahangofoth|wahangofoth]] || [[word:wahangofoj|wahangofoj]] || [[word:wahangofosh|wahangofosh]] || [[word:wahangof|wahangof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahangïfïf|wahangïfïf]] || [[word:wahangïfïf|wahangïfïf]] || [[word:wahangïfïf|wahangïfïf]] || [[word:wahangïfïf|wahangïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]] || [[word:wahangïf|wahangïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wahangæthæ|wahangæthæ]] || [[word:wahangæjæ|wahangæjæ]] || [[word:wahangæshæ|wahangæshæ]] || [[word:wahangæ|wahangæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahangathath|wahangathath]] || [[word:wahangajaj|wahangajaj]] || [[word:wahangashash|wahangashash]] || [[word:wahang|wahang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahangatha|wahangatha]] || [[word:wahangaja|wahangaja]] || [[word:wahangasha|wahangasha]] || [[word:wahanga|wahanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahangafath|wahangafath]] || [[word:wahangafaj|wahangafaj]] || [[word:wahangafash|wahangafash]] || [[word:wahangaf|wahangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wahangasha|wahangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowahangasha|gowahangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwahangasha|gokiwahangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wahangnüsha|wahangnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowahangnknüsha|gowahangnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahangnüsha|gokiwahangnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wahangshësha|wahangshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowahangnkshësha|gowahangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwahangshësha|gokiwahangshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahangrosha|wahangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahangnkrosha|gowahangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahangrosha|gokiwahangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wahangmusha|wahangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahangnkmusha|gowahangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahangmusha|gokiwahangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wahangsherasha|wahangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowahangnksherasha|gowahangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwahangsherasha|gokiwahangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wahangngasha|wahangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowahangnkngasha|gowahangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwahangngasha|gokiwahangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wahangyasha|wahangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowahangnkyasha|gowahangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwahangyasha|gokiwahangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wahangyamasha|wahangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowahangnkyamasha|gowahangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwahangyamasha|gokiwahangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wahangnüshësha|wahangnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowahangnknüshësha|gowahangnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwahangnüshësha|gokiwahangnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahangnürosha|wahangnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahangnknürosha|gowahangnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahangnürosha|gokiwahangnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahangnümusha|wahangnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahangnknümusha|gowahangnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahangnümusha|gokiwahangnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wahangshënüsha|wahangshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowahangnkshënüsha|gowahangnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahangshënüsha|gokiwahangshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahangshërosha|wahangshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahangnkshërosha|gowahangnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahangshërosha|gokiwahangshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahangshëmusha|wahangshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahangnkshëmusha|gowahangnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahangshëmusha|gokiwahangshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wahangronüsha|wahangronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowahangnkronüsha|gowahangnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahangronüsha|gokiwahangronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wahangroshësha|wahangroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowahangnkroshësha|gowahangnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwahangroshësha|gokiwahangroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wahangromusha|wahangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowahangnkromusha|gowahangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwahangromusha|gokiwahangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wahangmunüsha|wahangmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowahangnkmunüsha|gowahangnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwahangmunüsha|gokiwahangmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wahangmushësha|wahangmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowahangnkmushësha|gowahangnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwahangmushësha|gokiwahangmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wahangmurosha|wahangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowahangnkmurosha|gowahangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwahangmurosha|gokiwahangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wahang|wahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wæhæng|wæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howahang|howahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howæhæng|howæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowahang|hohowahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowæhæng|hohowæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüwahang|nüwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüwæhæng|nüwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüwahang|nünüwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüwæhæng|nünüwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïwahang|nïwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïwæhæng|nïwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïwahang|nïnïwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïwæhæng|nïnïwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwahang|luwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwæhæng|luwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwahang|luluwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwæhæng|luluwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwahang|liwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwæhæng|liwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwahang|liliwahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwæhæng|liliwæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowahang|kowahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowæhæng|kowæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowahang|kokowahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowæhæng|kokowæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewahang|kewahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewæhæng|kewæhæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewahang|kekewahang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewæhæng|kekewæhæng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
